text:

<never@nevermind.kiev.ua> wrote:

>>State:          open
>>Quarter:
>>Keywords:

>>Release:        FreeBSD 9.1-PRERELEASE amd64
>>Organization:
> Nevermind Ltd.
>>Environment:
> System: FreeBSD 9.1-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 9.1-PRERELEASE #0 r243957
>
>
>>Description:
>         New port for MariaDB 5.5.28a.
>
>         Requires repocopy from databases/mysql55-client and databases/mysql55-server ports (as of 5.5.28) and then applying patch.
>         Also requires minor patch to Mk/bsd.database.mk
>>How-To-Repeat:
>         N/A
>>Fix:

Please find file attached with updated ports for MariaDB 5.5, which
are now using same MYSQL_VER scheme as percona55-* ports.

-- 
Alexandr Kovalenko
